scripts.test: npm -w @rcc/shared run test --if-present && npm -w @rcc/research-core run test --if-present && npm -w @rcc/server run test --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @rcc/shared run typecheck && npm -w @rcc/research-core run typecheck && npm -w @rcc/server run typecheck && npm -w @rcc/web run typecheck
